---
description: "Use when creating or editing CSS for the presentation in output/. Covers design tokens, layout consistency, contrast, responsive behavior, and restrained motion."
applyTo: "output/**/*.css"
---
# CSS Rules

- Define colors, spacing, and typography with CSS custom properties.
- Keep layout patterns consistent across slides.
- Maintain readable contrast and visual hierarchy.
- Support desktop first, but avoid breaking on mobile widths.
- Use motion only when it improves presentation flow.
